creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 22.02.2014 23:17, Jin Guojun wrote:
> dmesg does not show useful information so enabled verbose for boot and
> hopefully it helps.

Hmmm, no psm device is attached at all, according to your dmesg. You
should have something like:
psm0: <PS/2 Mouse> irq 12 on atkbdc0
psm0: [GIANT-LOCKED]
psm0: model IntelliMouse Explorer, device ID 4

I have no idea why it doesn't work for you... Maybe you should open a
separate PR for that issue.

-- 
Jean-Sébastien Pédron
